title: polypodium penangianum
intro: Polypodium penangianum, also known as the Penang shield fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polypodium penangianum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes are typically dried and processed into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
